节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: This module provides the capability of manage external device.

注释信息: @param { number } busType - The bus type of device to be queried.
@throws { BusinessError } 22900001 - ExternalDeviceManager service exception or busType parameter error.

parameters.说明: The bus type of device to be queried.

error_codes.description: ExternalDeviceManager service exception or busType parameter error.

节点.功能描述: Bind the device based on the device information returned by queryDevices(). success. including device ID and remote object. 3.Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { number } deviceId - Device id on the device list returned by queryDevices().
@param { AsyncCallback<number> } onDisconnect - Callback is invoked when device is disconnected after bind
@param { AsyncCallback<{deviceId: number; remote: rpc.IRemoteObject;}> } callback - Indicates the bind result
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified. 2.Incorrect parameter types.

parameters.说明: Device id on the device list returned by queryDevices().
